findings.issue: Redundant API call in /forecast endpoint — same financial snapshot already computed in memory without needing Claude for basic math.
findings.suggestion: Pre-calculate on-track status locally (remaining / weeks <= 900), only call Claude if timeline is at risk or for narrative suggestions.
findings.est_impact: ~30-40 tokens per forecast request; reduces unnecessary API calls

findings.issue: /assess endpoint repeats deadline and on-track calculation that /fund-status already performs, then calls Claude for obvious yes/no.
findings.suggestion: Return pre-computed status with concern flag; only invoke Claude if weeks < 4 or weekly_needed > 1200 (escalation case).
findings.est_impact: ~25-35 tokens per assess call; high-frequency endpoint

findings.issue: AGENT_05_SYSTEM prompt includes 'TONE: Numbers first...' but /forecast and /assess both already enforce single-sentence responses in the user prompt.
findings.suggestion: Remove redundant tone guidance from system prompt; let user message directives control output format.

findings.issue: Fund log stores delta, balance, and notes, but /fund-status never uses fund_log history — only current balance. Historical data accumulates unused.
findings.suggestion: Either remove fund_log from memory writes or add a /history endpoint. Document the intent.
findings.est_impact: Memory bloat over time; unclear schema purpose
